p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5](x0: Sum[Sum[T0, T1], T2], x1: T0 -> T3, x2: T1 -> T4, x3: T2 -> T5) { sum_map[Sum[T0, T1], T2, Sum[T3, T4], T5](x0, function(x4: Sum[T0, T1]) { sum_map[T0, T1, T3, T4](x4, x1, x2) }, x3) = sum_map_left_nested[T0, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[A, B, C, D, E, F](sum_unassoc[A, B, C](s), f, g, h)

goal: sum_unassoc[D, E, F](sum_map_right_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](s, f, g, h)) = sum_map_left_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](sum_unassoc[A, B, C](s), f, g, h)
sum_map[B, C, E, F](rest, g, h) = Sum.inl[E, F](g(b))
sum_map_right_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](s, f, g, h) = Sum.inl[E, F](g(b)).inr

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5](x0: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x1: T0 -> T3, x2: T1 -> T4, x3: T2 -> T5) { sum_map[T0, Sum[T1, T2], T3, Sum[T4, T5]](x0, x1, function(x4: Sum[T1, T2]) { sum_map[T1, T2, T4, T5](x4, x2, x3) }) = sum_map_right_nested[T0, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[A, B, C, D, E, F](s, f, g, h)

goal: sum_unassoc[D, E, F](sum_map_right_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](s, f, g, h)) = Sum.inr[D, E](g(b)).inl

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T1, T2], x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x2: T1) { x0.inr != x1 or Sum.inl[T1, T2](x2) != x0 or Sum.inr[T0, T1](x2).inl = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[D, E, F](Sum.inl[E, F](g(b)), sum_map_right_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](s, f, g, h), g(b))

goal: sum_unassoc[A, B, C](s) = Sum.inr[A, B](b).inl

p.c: Sum.inl[B, C](b).inr = s

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T1, T2], x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x2: T1) { x0.inr != x1 or Sum.inl[T1, T2](x2) != x0 or Sum.inr[T0, T1](x2).inl = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[A, B, C](Sum.inl[B, C](b), s, b)

goal: sum_map[A, B, D, E](Sum.inr[A, B](b), f, g) = Sum.inr[D, E](g(b))
sum_map_left_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](sum_unassoc[A, B, C](s), f, g, h) = Sum.inr[D, E](g(b)).inl

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5](x0: Sum[Sum[T0, T1], T2], x1: T0 -> T3, x2: T1 -> T4, x3: T2 -> T5) { sum_map[Sum[T0, T1], T2, Sum[T3, T4], T5](x0, function(x4: Sum[T0, T1]) { sum_map[T0, T1, T3, T4](x4, x1, x2) }, x3) = sum_map_left_nested[T0, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[A, B, C, D, E, F](sum_unassoc[A, B, C](s), f, g, h)

sum_map[B, C, E, F](rest, g, h) = Sum.inr[E, F](h(c))
sum_map_right_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](s, f, g, h) = Sum.inr[E, F](h(c)).inr

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5](x0: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x1: T0 -> T3, x2: T1 -> T4, x3: T2 -> T5) { sum_map[T0, Sum[T1, T2], T3, Sum[T4, T5]](x0, x1, function(x4: Sum[T1, T2]) { sum_map[T1, T2, T4, T5](x4, x2, x3) }) = sum_map_right_nested[T0, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[A, B, C, D, E, F](s, f, g, h)

goal: sum_unassoc[D, E, F](sum_map_right_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](s, f, g, h)) = Sum.inr[Sum[D, E], F](h(c))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T1, T2], x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x2: T2) { x0.inr != x1 or Sum.inr[T1, T2](x2) != x0 or Sum.inr[Sum[T0, T1], T2](x2) = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[D, E, F](Sum.inr[E, F](h(c)), sum_map_right_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](s, f, g, h), h(c))

goal: sum_unassoc[A, B, C](s) = Sum.inr[Sum[A, B], C](c)

p.c: Sum.inr[B, C](c).inr = s

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T1, T2], x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x2: T2) { x0.inr != x1 or Sum.inr[T1, T2](x2) != x0 or Sum.inr[Sum[T0, T1], T2](x2) = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[A, B, C](Sum.inr[B, C](c), s, c)

goal: sum_map_left_nested[A, B, C, D, E, F](sum_unassoc[A, B, C](s), f, g, h) = Sum.inr[Sum[D, E], F](h(c))
